subcodes.title: Words to a stranger, spoken on 1914-05-09
subcodes.first_line: The Bahá'ís must be the servants of universal Peace, the workers for the Cause of the Oneness of the world of humanity, the spreaders of heavenly Love amongst the children of men
subcodes.subjects: @serving humanity; working for progress, betterment of the world, @lists; enumerations of Baha'i principles, @oneness; unity of religion, @prejudice; racial prejudice; class distinction, @harmony of science and religion, @love and unity, @call to action, @universal peace; world unity, @unity; oneness of humanity, @unity in diversity, @equality of men and women, @religion as reality; definitions of religion, @compassion; kindness
